summary: Iteration 51 - Daily Base Allocation system feature testing complete. All 12 features verified: (1) GET /api/orientation/daily-base/{user_id} returns base status, 3 base definitions with Hebrew allocations, and department history, (2) POST /api/orientation/daily-base/{user_id} saves base selection and returns allocations, (3) POST rejects invalid base values with 400, (4) GET /api/orientation/day-summary/{user_id} returns chosen_base, dept_allocation percentages, most_used_dept, neglected_dept, preferred_dept, (5) DailyBaseSelection shows 3 options: Heart (לב), Head (ראש), Body (גוף), (6) Selecting a base shows potential allocations and confirm button, (7) After confirmation compact view shows chosen base and allocation tags, (8) Daily question gated until base selected (gate message visible), (9) After base confirmation question becomes accessible (gate removed), (10) ClosingLayer dept summary shows when base chosen AND total_actions > 0, (11) Base selection persists on page reload, (12) All text Hebrew RTL.
critical_code_review_comments: BASE_DEFINITIONS at line 5079 correctly defines 3 bases with Hebrew names and allocations
DIRECTION_TO_DEPT mapping correctly maps: contribution→heart, recovery→body, order→head, exploration→head
GET /api/orientation/daily-base returns base_selected boolean, today_base, allocations_he, bases definitions, dept_history
POST /api/orientation/daily-base correctly validates base value against BASE_DEFINITIONS, returns 400 for invalid
day-summary endpoint correctly calculates dept_allocation percentages from direction counts
DailyBaseSelection.js has proper data-testid attributes: daily-base-selection, daily-base-confirmed, base-option-{key}, base-confirm-btn
Compact view shows chosen base with allocation tags after confirmation
HomeTab.js correctly gates DailyOrientationQuestion with baseSelected state
ClosingLayer.js correctly conditions dept summary on data.chosen_base && data.total_actions > 0
All components set dir='rtl' for Hebrew RTL support
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 51 adds Daily Base Allocation feature. Key data-testids: 'daily-base-selection' (unconfirmed state), 'daily-base-confirmed' (compact confirmed state), 'base-option-heart', 'base-option-head', 'base-option-body', 'base-confirm-btn', 'base-gate' (question gate message). ClosingLayer dept summary (testid: closing-dept-summary) only shows when base is chosen AND total_actions > 0. DB collection: daily_bases. Direction→Dept mapping: contribution→heart, recovery→body, order→head, exploration→head.

frontend_ui_tests.base_gate_message_visible: PASS - 'בחר בסיס יומי כדי להמשיך לפעולה'
frontend_ui_tests.dept_summary_conditional: PASS - only shows when base chosen AND actions > 0
